intro: Acanthoprasium frutescens, also known as Bitter melon or Bitter gourd, is a tropical vine native to Asia and Africa, belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-diabetic, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties, as well as potential treatments for cardiovascular diseases and obesity.
